summary: Verified Documents page features: confidence modal (first-visit gating + localStorage save + non-reappearance), flashcard count modal (post-upload auto-open, count-25 processes, count-cancel closes, Process button reopens). Backend ?count=10 generates exactly 10 flashcards. No console runtime errors.
passed: Confidence modal appears on first visit (localStorage cleared)
Slider set to 7, save closes modal, localStorage.crystal_confidence === '7' (verified via proper React-compatible event)
On reload with saved value, confidence modal does NOT reappear
Process button on unprocessed doc reopens count-modal
count-25 click -> Document processed toast '12 questions, 25 flashcards, 6 topics extracted' visible; doc shows READY
Zero console errors during full flow
action_items: Note: setting <input type='range'> value via plain DOM event does not trigger React onChange. Tests must use the native value setter pattern (Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value').set). This is a test-script concern only; the feature works correctly for real user drag interactions.
